title: La Orquesta de los Animales
author: Beibei Amigos Language Preschool
grammar: El/La + animal + toca + el/la + instrumento (repetitive pattern)
educationalObjectives: Learn names of 6 musical instruments in Spanish
Develop vocabulary about music and animals
culturalNotes: Music is central to Hispanic culture across all countries
Many Spanish-speaking children learn instruments from a young age
Classical guitar (guitarra clásica) has deep roots in Spanish culture

seo.metaTitle: La Orquesta de los Animales - Free Spanish Book for Kids | Musical Instruments
seo.metaDescription: Interactive Spanish book teaching musical instruments to preschoolers. Learn piano, guitarra, tambor, trompeta, flauta, violín in Spanish. Free online book with audio for ages 2-5.
focusKeyphrases: musical instruments in spanish for kids

parentTips: Act out playing each instrument as you read
Find videos of real instruments being played and watch together
Encourage your child to 'conduct' the animal orchestra
Make simple shakers or drums at home and play along
Sing the phrases to create a simple melody
extensionActivities: Visit a music store to see real instruments
Watch a children's orchestra performance online
Make a DIY drum with a pot and wooden spoon
Learn a simple song in Spanish together
callsToAction: Schedule a tour at Beibei Amigos
